name: Stephanie's Polska Kielbasa Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh or frozen vegetables (broccoli, carrots, celery, cauliflower, etc.)
1 pound Smoked Sausage or Polska Kielbasa
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir fry the vegetables in butter until tender crisp.
2. Add herbs and sausage, cut into bite-size pieces. Heat through.
3. Stir in cheese. Serve over hot buttered noodles with additional Parmesan cheese.
